narrative:
Ada North (precinct in Hardin County) has 1,103 registered voters, with 59.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.9 percentage points.
